indicators_used.name: Cross-Border Flow Anomaly Score
indicators_used.description: Z-score deviation of current flows from 30-day rolling mean. Large negative = unusual drop.

indicators_used.name: Gas Flow Disruption Indicator
indicators_used.description: Z-score of gas flows vs 30-day mean. Abrupt drops flag disruption.

indicators_used.name: Telecom Cables Offline
indicators_used.description: Count of known Baltic telecom cable outages.

indicators_used.name: Alternative Route Availability (inverted)
indicators_used.description: Whether bypass routes exist for disrupted corridors. 0 = no alternative.
